# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

elasticsearch:
  node.name: es-master
  cluster.name: my-es-cluster
  path.data: /data/elasticsearch
  discovery.seed_hosts: ["127.0.0.1", "es-node-1", "es-node-2"]
  http.port: 9200
  network.host: 0.0.0.0
  elasticsearch.repo.path: /data/elasticsearch
  snapshot.repository.s3.type: s3
  snapshot.repository.s3.bucket: my-es-backup
  snapshot.repository.s3.region: us-west-2
  snapshot.repository.s3.compress: true
  snapshot.repo_url: "s3://my-es-backup"
  action.refreshindex.enable: true
  action.purge.enabled: false
  action.delete_indices_on_stop: false

restoration:
  snapshot.restore.enabled: true
